briefdescription.para: This function will enable the interrupts present in the interrupt mask passed onto the function.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi2Rx instance to operate on
is the interrupt mask which need to be enabled in core

briefdescription.para: This function will disable the interrupts present in the interrupt mask passed onto the function.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on
is the interrupt mask which need to be enabled in core

briefdescription.para: This function will get the interrupt mask set (enabled) in the DSI core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on

simplesect.para: Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt in Interrupt enable register

briefdescription.para: This function will get the list of interrupts Invoked in the Interrupt Status Register of the DSI core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on

simplesect.para: Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt in Interrupt Status register

briefdescription.para: This function will clear the interrupts set in the Interrupt Status Register of the DSI core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi2Rx instance to operate on
is Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt to be cleared in the Interrupt Status register

briefdescription.para: This routine installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Invoked by this driver when: ----------------------- -------------------------------------------------- XDSI2RX_HANDLER_UNSUPPORT_DATATYPE Unsupported data type XDSI2RX_HANDLER_CRC_ERROR CRC error XDSI2RX_HANDLER_ECC1_BIT_ERROR ECC 1 bit error XDSI2RX_HANDLER_ECC2_BIT_ERROR ECC 2 bit error XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_SYNC_ERR_LANE1 SOT sync error on line 1 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_ERR_LANE1 SOT error on line 1 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_SYNC_ERR_LANE2 SOT sync error on line 2 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_ERR_LANE2 SOT error on line 2 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_SYNC_ERR_LANE3 SOT sync error on line 3 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_ERR_LANE3 SOT error on line 3 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_SYNC_ERR_LANE4 SOT sync error on line 4 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_ERR_LANE4 SOT error on line 4 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_STOP_STATE STOP state XDSI2RX_HANDLER_LM_ASYNC_FIFO_FULL Long msg asyn fifo full. XDSI2RX_HANDLER_STREAM_ASYNC_FIFO_FULL stream async fifo full XDSI2RX_HANDLER_GSP_FIFO_NE generic short packet fifo not empty XDSI2RX_HANDLER_GSP_FIFO_FULL generic short packet fifo full XDSI2RX_HANDLER_FRAME_STARTED frame started

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on
is the type of call back to be registered.
is the pointer to a call back function which is called when a particular event occurs.
is a void pointer to data to be referenced to by the CallbackFunc

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the DSI core.

detaileddescription.para: This handler reads the Invoked interrupt from the Interrupt Status register determines the source of the interrupts and calls the respective callbacks for the interrupts that are enabled in Interrupt Enable register and finally clears the interrupts.

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this core is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XDsi2Rx_SetCallback() during initialization phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDsi2Rx core instance.

simplesect.para: Interrupt should be enabled to execute interrupt handler.
